description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, constructed from wood or wood veneer with a natural, warm brown finish. The front face features two wide drawers with subtle horizontal grooves indicating their separation, and the wood grain pattern is continuous and visually appealing. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, showcasing the same wood grain texture, while the base is slightly recessed, giving the cabinet a floating appearance. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks, suggesting a push-to-open or handleless drawer mechanism. The overall build appears sturdy and solid, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. Its clean lines and natural finish make it ideal for contemporary office or home environments.
description: A modern, wood-finished filing cabinet with two wide drawers and a handleless, minimalist design. The cabinet features a continuous wood grain and a recessed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wide drawers with a continuous wood grain and no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat, unadorned wood surface with a vertical grain pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, flat wooden back with a consistent grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a flat wood surface and vertical grain.
